name: health
func: msg.statusCode=200; msg.payload={ status:'ok', service:'node-red' }; return msg;

name: get trace
func: const id = msg.req.params.orderId; const e = id ? global.get("traceOrder_" + id) : null; msg.statusCode = e?200:404; msg.payload = e || { error: "not found" }; return msg;

name: Init+Correlation
400 bad payload
func: msg.statusCode=400; msg.payload={error:"Invalid orchestration body",need:"orderId,correlationId,order"}; return msg;

name: MessageTranslator: standard
func: msg.saga.hint = "retail"; msg.saga.channel = "web"; return msg;

name: MessageTranslator: express
func: msg.saga.hint = "mobile-express"; msg.saga.channel = "app"; return msg;

name: MessageTranslator: b2b
func: msg.saga.hint = "b2b"; msg.saga.channel = "procurement"; return msg;

name: Unknown type
func: msg.statusCode=400; msg.payload={error:"Unknown orderType"}; return msg;

name: Line totals
Prep payment → AMQP
Merge AMQP reply+SAGA
After payment (3out)
Response failed (payment)
func: const s=msg.saga; msg.statusCode=200; msg.payload={orderId:s.orderId,correlationId:s.correlationId,status:"failed",trace:s.trace}; return msg;

name: DLC: payment 5xx
func: const s=msg.saga||{trace:[]}; s.trace=s.trace||[]; s.trace.push({step:"dead-letter",status:"failed"}); try{ if(s.orderId) global.set("dlq:"+s.orderId, {at:new Date().toISOString(), reason:"payment_5xx", trace:s.trace});}catch(e){} msg.statusCode=500; msg.payload={orderId:s.orderId,correlationId:s.correlationId,status:"error",deadLetter:true,trace:s.trace,reason:"payment_unrecoverable"}; return msg;

name: prep inventory
After inv (3out)
DLC inv 5xx
func: const s=msg.saga||{trace:[]}; s.trace=s.trace||[]; s.trace.push({step:"dead-letter",status:"failed"}); try{ if(s.orderId) global.set("dlq:"+s.orderId, {at:new Date().toISOString(), reason:"inventory_5xx", trace:s.trace});}catch(e){} msg.statusCode=500; msg.payload={orderId:s.orderId,correlationId:s.correlationId,status:"error",deadLetter:true,trace:s.trace,reason:"inventory_5xx"}; return msg;

name: refund (inv 422)
After refund inv-fail
prep notification
After notif 2out
completed + fanout copy
func:
const s=msg.saga; msg.statusCode=200; msg.payload={orderId:s.orderId,correlationId:s.correlationId,status:"completed",trace:s.trace};
const a={type:"orderCompleted",orderId:s.orderId,correlationId:s.correlationId,at:new Date().toISOString()}; return [msg,{ payload: a }];

label: RabbitMQ bonus (fanout)
info: Two queues bound to the same fanout — see Management UI and Node-RED debug (warn)

name: log c1 (warn)
func: const t=(typeof msg.payload==="string")?msg.payload:JSON.stringify(msg.payload||{}); node.warn("[fanout consumer c1] "+t); return null;

name: log c2 (warn)
func: const t=(typeof msg.payload==="string")?msg.payload:JSON.stringify(msg.payload||{}); node.warn("[fanout consumer c2] "+t); return null;

name: prep release
After release
refund or DLQ
After notif comp
